Prefect Karukia:
I summoned you here because I have a secret request. Don't worry and don't hesistate. I wouldn't have called for you if I wasn't sure you could do it.
Not everyone agrees, though. You've proven yourself on the battlefield, but combat prowess alone is not enough to earn the trust of the High Orcs. That's why we want you to face the Totem Spirit's Trial.
It won't be easy for an outlander, but I have no doubt you will succeed.
